parameter.name: pollInterval
parameter.label: Poll Interval
parameter.description: Time between polling data in milliseconds.

parameter.name: maxTries
parameter.label: Maximum Tries
parameter.description: How many times read/write operations are retried when communication fails.

parameter.name: writeProtectionDurationSeconds
parameter.label: Write Protection Duration
parameter.description: How long written channel values remain in local shadow state.

parameter.name: autoThirdPartyControl
parameter.label: Auto Third Party Control
parameter.description: Automatically switch Solarbank devices into third party control mode on connect so power setpoint and direction writes take effect. Ignored for non-Solarbank devices.
